title: ferray-window: dpss (discrete prolate spheroidal sequences)
description: Follow-up from #740. chebwin shipped via direct DFT. dpss is the remaining scipy.signal.windows function — discrete prolate spheroidal sequences, computed as the eigenvectors of a symmetric tridiagonal matrix. Needs either: (a) a tridiagonal eigensolver in ferray-linalg (currently only general/symmetric eigsolvers exist), or (b) a small inline tridiagonal QL routine. Worth ~150 lines of careful numerical code.
